jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Nykaa
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
